a warm, golden sun shining down from a clear blue sky
the rhythmic sound of waves crashing against the shore
a sun-kissed beach populated by happy vacationers and locals alike
the salty taste of sea spray on your lips

photojournalism.newsExtreme.title: News extreme
photojournalism.newsExtreme.description: Catastrophic, world-altering, and extreme global news events and disasters
examples: a new global disease epidemic threatens the world
a major corporation is caught in a massive bribery scandal
a new form of ai becomes self-aware and begins acting on its own
a high-profile billionaire is arrested on live television for running a global espionage ring
a massive new dinosaur fossil is discovered
a highly infectious computer worm shuts down global hospital networks and medical devices

photojournalism.newsNormal.title: News normal
photojournalism.newsNormal.description: Standard major news headlines covering science, politics, business, and society
examples: a passionate community rally is held to protest the closure of a historic local library
a major development in international relations, such as a new trade deal or a new peace treaty
a major technology conference, bringing together innovators and entrepreneurs from around the world
a major international airport suffers a system-wide it failure, grounding hundreds of commercial flights
a major natural disaster, such as a hurricane or earthquake, that leaves thousands of people displaced
a massive clean-up effort is organized by volunteers on a heavily polluted public beach

photojournalism.newsSpecific.title: News specific
photojournalism.newsSpecific.description: Highly detailed, specific descriptions of major global news events and crises
examples: a major political scandal: a top government official is caught in a sexting scandal, leading to calls for his resignation and damaging his political career
a major world crisis: the covid-19 pandemic sweeps across the globe, leading to millions of deaths and upending daily life for billions of people
a major cybersecurity breach: a state-sponsored hacking group accesses sensitive personnel records of millions of federal employees
a new scientific discovery: scientists discover a new species of dinosaur, providing new insights into the prehistoric world and sparking excitement among paleontologists and the public alike
a massive labor strike: thousands of autoworkers walk off the job, shutting down major manufacturing plants across the country
a critical space rescue: an international crew of astronauts executes a daring spacewalk to repair a damaged life-support system

photojournalism.styleProtest.title: Style protest
photojournalism.styleProtest.description: Various photographic styles and techniques used in photojournalism and documentary photography
examples: artistic photojournalism: using creative techniques and visual storytelling to convey the mood and emotions of the protests
monochrome photojournalism: stripping away color to emphasize form, texture, shadow, and the pure raw emotion of the moment
unposed candid portraiture: capturing subjects unaware of the camera to document authentic, unvarnished human reactions and interactions
underwater and rain-spattered photography: shooting through wet lenses or during heavy downpours to capture the grueling physical conditions of outdoor protests
panoramic photography: capturing the scale and size of large-scale protests and demonstrations
analog film photography: using traditional 35mm or medium format film to create a raw, grain-textured aesthetic with natural color tones

photojournalism.types.title: Types of photojournalism
photojournalism.types.description: Diverse subjects and thematic beats covered in photojournalism and documentary reporting
examples: investigative reporting on corporate corruption and misconduct
natural disaster recovery and rebuilding, focusing on communities restoring their lives after catastrophes

plot.action.title: Action plots
plot.action.description: High-stakes, thrilling scenarios involving combat, heists, rescues, and survival

surviving in a wilderness or jungle
stopping a mass murderer or serial killer
saving a kidnapped vip or important figure
breaking out of a high-tech underwater prison

plot.arthouse.title: Arthouse plots
plot.arthouse.description: Introspective narratives focusing on emotional struggles, relationships, and personal crises
examples: falling in love against all odds
searching for connection in a deeply alienated modern metropolis

plot.fantasy.title: Fantasy plots

reclaiming a throne usurped by a puppet king
discovering a hidden society of magic-users
binding a rogue demon to a mortal vessel
investigating strange occurrences or supernatural events

plot.general.title: General plots

plot.horror.title: Horror plots

examples: surviving in a world overrun by demons
escaping a remote gas station surrounded by shadowy creatures

investigating an old videotape that curses whoever watches it

plot.musical.title: Musical plots

plot.romance.title: Romance plots

navigating a romance between a member of royalty and a commoner
falling in love while planning a mutual friend's wedding
navigating the challenges of marriage or long-term commitment

plot.scifi.title: Sci-fi plots

set.moviegenBench.title: Benchmark prompt set from MovieGenBench
set.moviegenBench.description: MovieGen Video Bench contains 1003 diverse prompts testing various aspects including human activities (motion, emotions), animals, nature/scenery, physics (fluids, gravity, collisions), and unusual subjects/activities. The prompts provide comprehensive coverage across high, medium and low motion scenarios.
examples: A rose is growing out of a stone
Bioluminescent waves gently wash ashore on a deserted beach, illuminating the sand with each cresting wave as a figure walks along the water's edge, leaving glowing footprints.
A fencer engaged in a fast-paced duel.
Corgis jumping out of a coffee cup
a woman wearing blue jeans and a white t shirt taking a pleasant stroll in Mumbai India during a winter storm
A high-speed video of champagne being poured into a glass, with bubbles rising rapidly.

set.parti.title: PartiPrompts
set.parti.description: PartiPrompts (P2) is a rich set of over 1600 prompts in English. P2 can be used to measure model capabilities across various categories and challenge aspects.

A bowl of soup that looks like a monster spray-painted on a wall
a pineapple surfing on a wave
the word 'START' on a blue t-shirt
a prop plane flying low over the Great Wall
a flower with large yellow petals
